title: NoBroker is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: NoBroker is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? NoBroker in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
